title.en: China-to-Antigua and Barbuda BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入安提瓜和巴布达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入安地卡及巴布達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Antigua and Barbuda ABBS product conformity requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards expected in project specifications, APUA grid-connection requirements, Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and 50 Hz / 230-400 V grid context — versus China GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与安提瓜和巴布达ABBS产品合格评定要求、项目规格中预期的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、APUA并网要求、安提瓜和巴布达消防局消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输要求及50 Hz / 230-400 V电网背景——对比中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與安地卡及巴布達ABBS產品合格評定要求、項目規格中預期的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、APUA併網要求、安地卡及巴布達消防局消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸要求及50 Hz / 230-400 V電網背景——對比中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ABBS conformity scope determination, APUA grid-connection approval, Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Antigua and Barbuda ABBS requirements, APUA grid-connection technical specifications, Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ABBS合格评定范围裁定、APUA并网批准、安提瓜和巴布达消防局安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行安提瓜和巴布达ABBS要求、APUA并网技术规格、安提瓜和巴布达消防局要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ABBS合格評定範圍裁定、APUA併網批准、安地卡及巴布達消防局安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行安地卡及巴布達ABBS要求、APUA併網技術規格、安地卡及巴布達消防局要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Antigua and Barbuda does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or a dedicated BESS conformity regime under ABBS. BESS projects operate primarily under project-specific international standards referenced in APUA interconnection agreements and Antigua and Barbuda Fire Service approvals. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Antigua and Barbuda are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in APUA or project-owner specifications; (3) Fire Service installation approval, including evidence aligned with NFPA 855 as the dominant BESS fire-installation code; (4) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions for sea freight via St John's Port; (5) 230/400 V grid configuration for BESS PCS — CRITICAL: Antigua and Barbuda shares 50 Hz with China, but the nominal voltage differs (Antigua and Barbuda 230/400 V vs China 220/380 V) — PCS must be re-parameterised and re-tested; and (6) hurricane-resilience structural and environmental design for Category 4–5 wind loads and tropical marine salt-mist conditions. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC 62619 evidence in project or authority review.
answer_first.zh: 安提瓜和巴布达尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》相当，也无ABBS下的专门BESS合格评定制度。BESS项目主要依据APUA并网协议和安提瓜和巴布达消防局批准中引用的项目专属国际标准运作。中国BESS出口安提瓜和巴布达的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为项目验收的国际预期基准；（2）APUA或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）消防局安装批准，包括与BESS消防安装主导规范NFPA 855相符的证据；（4）经圣约翰港海运的国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件；（5）BESS PCS的230/400 V电网配置——重要提示：安提瓜和巴布达与中国同为50 Hz，但电压不同（安提瓜和巴布达为230/400 V，中国为220/380 V）——PCS须重新进行参数配置和测试；（6）适用于四至五级风荷载和热带海洋盐雾条件的飓风韧性结构和环境设计。中国GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023是生产基准，但在项目或主管机关审查中不被接受为IEC 62619证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 安地卡及巴布達尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》相當，也無ABBS下的專門BESS合格評定制度。BESS項目主要依據APUA併網協議和安地卡及巴布達消防局批准中引用的項目專屬國際標準運作。中國BESS出口安地卡及巴布達的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為項目驗收的國際預期基準；（2）APUA或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）消防局安裝批准，包括與BESS消防安裝主導規範NFPA 855相符的證據；（4）經聖約翰港海運的國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件；（5）BESS PCS的230/400 V電網配置——重要提示：安地卡及巴布達與中國同為50 Hz，但電壓不同（安地卡及巴布達為230/400 V，中國為220/380 V）——PCS須重新進行參數配置和測試；（6）適用於四至五級風荷載和熱帶海洋鹽霧條件的颶風韌性結構和環境設計。中國GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023是製造基準，但在項目或主管機關審查中不被接受為IEC 62619證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
